stemHtml: The effect of change of ambient temperature on an aeroplane performance will be to…

options.a: Cause a decrease in the landing distance required for an increase in temperature
options.b: Cause an increase of the climb gradient for a decrease in temperature
options.c: Cause a decrease in take-off distance required for an increase in temperature
options.d: Cause an increase in the take-off ground run for a decrease in temperature
